summary: Generation context now loads bounded CategoryPlaybook and PromptTemplate context into blog draft/search structure generation, exact playbook/template matches are fetched and prioritized before broad partial matches, runtime service tests prove the loaded context reaches adapter calls, and planning docs describe jose signed-cookie auth instead of NextAuth.js.

commands.command: npx biome check lib/ai/adapter.ts lib/ai/mockAdapter.ts lib/content/generationContext.ts lib/content/service.ts lib/content/searchStructure.ts tests/p3-contract.test.ts tests/p1-auth-company-profile.test.ts docs/planning/02-trd.md docs/planning/06-tasks.md docs/planning/07-coding-convention.md

blockerResolution.promptTemplateSelection: PromptTemplate loading queries exact aliases first and only falls back to partial contains matches when no exact alias exists; tests prove exact blog_draft_generation beats a higher-version partial shadow.
blockerResolution.categoryPlaybookSelection: CategoryPlaybook loading queries exact product/company categories separately from token contains matches before merged ranking/slicing; tests prove exact category context survives 24 broad partial matches.
blockerResolution.runtimeWiring: P3 tests execute generateContentPackage plus generateSearchStructure with mocked module boundaries and assert generationContext reaches both adapter calls.
